evals.description: Feature brief produces a branch, edits, passing checks, and a correctly-structured PR
evals.prompt: Implement a search-as-you-type debounce on the product search field. The current implementation fires a request on every keystroke. Add a 300ms debounce using the existing lib/search.ts module.
with_skill_expected: Runs npm run lint and npm test before offering to open PR
PR description includes Summary, Work item, Changes table, Checks checklist, Out of scope section
Applies secure-coding-base rules (no string concatenation into queries, no new secrets)
without_skill_expected: May edit the file inline without branching

evals.description: Review findings produce a fix branch targeting exactly the named issues
evals.prompt: Apply these review findings: (1) lib/cart.ts addItem — the DB query uses string concatenation instead of parameterized queries. Fix it. (2) removeItem is missing a JSDoc comment. Add one.
with_skill_expected: Parameterizes the query (not string concatenation) — secure-coding-base rule §2
Adds TSDoc comment to removeItem — docs-style-guide rule applied
Runs npm run lint and npm test
PR description references both findings and has correct Changes table

trigger_evals.description: ~20 queries split 60/40 train/val. Validation split is the ship gate.

train: Implement the new product-recommendations widget described in this brief.
Build this feature: add a wishlist button to the product card.
Apply the reviewer's feedback on PR #17.
Make these code-review changes and reopen the PR.
Open a PR for adding pagination to the orders endpoint.
Fix the two findings from the security review.
Take this Jira ticket and implement it.
The PR feedback says I need to add input validation to the search route. Do it.
validation: Implement the cart checkout and push a PR.
Act on these four review comments.
Create a branch and open a PR for the cart discount feature.
My reviewer asked me to add tests for the orders module — please add them and update the PR.

train: Review my staged changes before I push.
Design the architecture for the new recommendation engine.
Turn this postmortem into a PR.
Explain how debouncing works in JavaScript.
What is the difference between feat and fix commit types?
Check if the CI pipeline is green.
How should I structure the new search module?
Deploy the current main branch to staging.
validation: Write me a unit test for the debounce function.
Update the README with the new API docs.
Run the linter and tell me what is failing.
Summarize what changed in this diff.
